title: Continuous Delivery Outcomes, Flow, Feedback, and Evidence · Delivery Incident Triage
summary: A release responder inherits a plausible but defective delivery outcome and evidence map; preserve run evidence, isolate the first causal fault in continuous delivery outcomes, flow, feedback, and evidence, and retain a regression check. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in delivery outcome and evidence map and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence d…
objectives: Distinguish continuous integration, delivery, deployment, release, and feature exposure by their automation, decision, and stakeholder boundaries.
Relate batch size, queue time, feedback latency, failure isolation, recovery cost, and learning speed without treating deployment frequency as the objective.
Trace requirement, source revision, review, checks, build inputs, immutable artifact, deployment, observation, and recovery evidence as one delivery chain.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Ci Ci Cd Release Boundaries
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug service deploys 4 times per week but cannot connect reviewed source, required checks, immutable artifact, production revision, user signal, abort decision, or recovery. Define value and delivery evidence without gaming one metric. Competency probe: Distinguish continuous integration, delivery, deployment, release, and feature exposure by their automation, decision, and stakeholder boundaries.

Inspect the Ci Ci Cd Release Boundaries trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Ci Ci Cd Release Boundaries.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for distinguish continuous integration, delivery, deployment, release, and feature exposure by their automation, decision, and stakeholder boundaries. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Ci Ci Cd Release Boundaries, keep Ci Ci Cd Release Boundaries connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Ci Release Hypothesis Done
steps.instruction:
Append the CI/CD evidence item headed "  # Evidence: ci-release-hypothesis-done-13kh6b". Tailor its delivery-evidence.yaml change to the current stakeholder case, retain a deterministic workflow or release review, reject one concrete failure, and record a repair. The browser analyzes text only; run GitHub Actions, runner, Docker, registry, OIDC, Google Cloud, and deployment work later in authorized disposable transfer environments.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Ci Release Hypothesis Done.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Ci Release Hypothesis Done into observable performance evidence. For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Ci Release Hypothesis Done, keep Ci Release Hypothesis Done connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: ci-release-hypothesis-done-13kh6b
  - competency: ci-release-hypothesis-done
    artifact: delivery-evidence.yaml
    decision: release hypothesis done
    environment: Node 24 TypeScript monorepo with three lockfiles
    fault-injection: remove one supported Node and operating-system matrix cell
    retained-proof: queue duration critical path failure class recovery and cost evidence
    case-key: 13kh6b
    change: |
      hypothesis: safer-status-release
      source-revision: reviewed-sha
      checks: required-and-observed
      artifact: immutable-digest
      deployment: revision-identity
      user-signal: successful-status-read
      abort-signal: error-budget-breach
      recovery: prior-digest
    verify: review source-to-user evidence chain and calculate lead time failure and recovery boundaries
    failure: Reject deployment count as value, green checks as provenance, or pipeline completion as user outcome.
    repair: Link reviewed source, exact checks, immutable artifact, observed deployment, user signal, abort decision, and recovery evidence.
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
